Rule Type

Description

When all of these conditions are met:

Affected files contains mots.yaml
Changed file content does not contain config:

Take these actions the first time this rule matches:

Add comment: Please ensure that `mots clean` is run before this patch lands. See https://mots.readthedocs.io/en/latest/#cleaning-mots-yaml for more information.
